title: genista hirsuta subsp. lanuginosa
intro: Genista hirsuta subsp. lanuginosa is a sub-species of the Genista hirsuta plant, commonly known as downy broom or downy broom sedge, and is a type of flowering shrub native to Europe. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Genista hirsuta subsp. lanuginosa include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and act as an expectorant to relieve respiratory issues. The plant is typically prepared as a herbal tea or infusions, and it can also be dried and used in tinctures or capsules for its medicinal properties.
